query:
INSERT INTO cycle_history (userId, trainingSetId, cycleNumber, totalPuzzles, correctCount, totalTimeMs, completedAt) 
SELECT u.id, CONCAT('ga-import-', u.id), 1, 1, ROUND(RAND()), ROUND(60000 + RAND() * 60000), NOW()
FROM users u 
WHERE u.openId LIKE 'ga-%'
UNION ALL
SELECT u.id, CONCAT('ga-import-', u.id), 2, 1, ROUND(RAND()), ROUND(60000 + RAND() * 60000), NOW()
FROM users u 
WHERE u.openId LIKE 'ga-%'
UNION ALL
SELECT u.id, CONCAT('ga-import-', u.id), 3, 1, ROUND(RAND()), ROUND(60000 + RAND() * 60000), NOW()
FROM users u 
WHERE u.openId LIKE 'ga-%';
